---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "Michelle Liu"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
#| label: storms-plot
storms |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarise(n_storms = n_distinct(name), .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n_storms)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Named Storms per Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Named Storms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
